options_flow_summary: Massive $77.8M in deep OTM puts at $250 and $240 strikes expiring March 2026 signals institutional hedging or directional betting on significant downside from current levels.
news_sentiment_summary: Absence of positive headlines amid DeepSeek AI disruption narrative (mentioned in synthesis) creates information vacuum during critical period for AI leadership validation.
market_context_summary: High volatility downtrend regime pressures momentum names like NVDA while DeepSeek disruption threatens AI moat assumptions and semiconductor strength faces geopolitical headwinds from China tensions.
key_drivers: DeepSeek AI disruption challenging NVDA's AI dominance narrative
Massive put positioning at $250/$240 suggesting institutional downside protection

trade_idea: Short NVDA equity or buy $250 puts expiring March 2026 - AI disruption thesis combined with massive institutional put flow suggests significant downside risk over 12-month horizon.
